response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff-level generalist with nearly two decades of broad full-stack experience, strong testing culture, and some high-throughput systems work (Sociomantic's real-time ad infrastructure). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and growth measurement — none of which appear in the resume. There is no evidence of building experimentation or metrics systems, no statistical analysis background, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership at the scope this level requires.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
High-scale, low-latency production experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source authorship
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of principal-level scope: no multi-team initiatives, org-wide architecture, or platform ownership serving many teams
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background relative to the role's core focus

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale experience
